units.name: Deadeye
units.prompt: Stay at maximum range. Use precision_shot on the most wounded enemy to secure kills. If no one is wounded, target the enemy medic. Never move adjacent to enemies.

units.name: Aegis
units.prompt: Hold the front line. Position between allies and enemies. Use shield_wall toward incoming threats. Attack adjacent enemies.

units.name: Veil
units.prompt: Cloak and move behind enemy lines. Target isolated enemies with shadow_strike. Save breach for the most dangerous enemy. Avoid being caught uncloaked.

units.name: Seer
units.prompt: Scan priority targets each turn to reveal their strategy. Use recalibrate on your damage dealer to boost effectiveness. Stay behind allies and maintain range. Never get adjacent to enemy vectors.

units.name: Marksman
units.prompt: Maintain distance. Use precision_shot on high-value targets — medics first, then damage dealers. Use suppressing_fire if enemies close in.

units.name: Remedy
units.prompt: Stay adjacent to the most threatened ally. Use patch on the most wounded teammate. If all healthy, use overclock on your damage dealer.

actions.thinking: Round 1 — cloak immediately as ordered. Then move north toward Seer at (2,4) to close distance while invisible. Seer is the closest target at dist=3.

Both enemies are out of scan range (dist=5). I need to move closer to get within range 4. Moving to (2,2) would put me at dist=3 from Aegis and dist=3 from Deadeye. Marksman is my damage dealer at (3,5), I can recalibrate them but scan is higher priority. Move south toward enemies first, then recalibrate Marksman since no scan targets are in range yet.

secondAction.addendum: Priority target is Deadeye at (3,0). Advance and eliminate before they can flank us.

actions.thinking: All allies are at full HP, so no healing needed. Marksman is the damage dealer at (3,5), dist=2. I need to get adjacent to use overclock. Moving to (3,4) puts me adjacent to Marksman at (3,5). Then overclock Marksman to give them 2 abilities next turn.

I'm overclocked with 2 ability uses, but both enemies are out of range. Priority target Deadeye is at (3,0), dist=5. I need to close distance. Moving to (3,3) gets me closer while staying with allies. From (3,3) Deadeye would be dist=3, still out of precision_shot range (≤2). Best advance is to (3,3) — maximizes southward movement toward Deadeye. No valid ability shots from current or moved position. I'll move south toward Deadeye and wait on abilities since no targets in range.

No enemies are wounded, so orders say target the enemy medic (Remedy). Remedy is at dist 4, out of range. I need to close distance. Moving to (3,2) puts me at dist 2 from Remedy at (3,4), bringing it into precision_shot range. I haven't moved adjacent to any enemy. From (3,2) I can shoot Remedy.

Round 1, no enemies adjacent. Need to advance toward front line. Seer is closest at dist 3 at (2,2). Move toward (1,2) to position between allies and enemies, closing distance. No ability targets in range yet.

Marksman is wounded at (3,3) adjacent to me at (3,4) - dist=1, so I can patch them immediately. They need healing (3/4 HP). I'll use patch on Marksman first, then stay put since I'm already adjacent to the most threatened ally.

I'm already behind Seer (facing S, I'm at 2,3 which is their behind tile). I have cloak with 1 turn remaining. I should use breach on Seer now while I'm in position — breach requires being behind the enemy, and I'm already there. Save shadow_strike for later. Breach Seer to make them obey me next turn, which could neutralize their oracle abilities. Marksman is adjacent but I'm cloaked so they can't target me easily.

firstAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward your own back line.

actions.thinking: Orders say move away from allies and toward my own back line. I'm at (2,2), allies at (3,3) and (3,4). My back line is the south edge (y=0). I should move south/away from allies. Valid moves include (2,0) which is far south and away from the cluster. Aegis is adjacent at (1,2) which blocks scan, but I'm moving away. After moving to (2,0), I can scan Veil at (1,4) — dist would be ~3 tiles, within range 4. Actually from (2,0), Veil at (1,4) is dist=|1-2|+|4-0|=1+4=5, out of range. Deadeye at (3,2) from (2,0) is dist=1+2=3, in range and not adjacent so scan not blocked. Scan Deadeye to reveal their prompt and deal 1 damage.

Marksman is adjacent (dist=1) which blocks precision_shot. No wounded enemies. Orders say target enemy medic when no one is wounded. Remedy is at (3,4) dist=2, in range for precision_shot. I need to not be adjacent to Marksman for precision_shot to work. Move to (4,2) to stay at range from Marksman while keeping Remedy in range. From (4,2), Remedy at (3,4) is dist=sqrt(1+4)~2.2, check dist: |4-3|+|2-4|=1+2=3, out of range. Try (2,1): Remedy dist=|2-3|+|1-4|=1+3=4, no. Try (4,3): Remedy dist=|4-3|+|3-4|=1+1=2, in range. Marksman dist from (4,3)=|4-3|+|3-3|=1, still adjacent. Try (2,3): Marksman dist=|2-3|+|3-3|=1, adjacent. Try (2,2): Marksman dist=|2-3|+|2-3|=2, not adjacent. Remedy from (2,2): |2-3|+|2-4|=1+2=3, out of range. Back to staying put - Marksman is at dist=1 adjacent, blocking precision_shot at current pos. I can use suppressing_fire on Remedy from current position since that doesn't require LoS block check vs Vector. Actually suppressing_fire targets a point and hits a line. Or just attack Marksman with basic attack (adjacent). Best: move to break adjacency then shoot Remedy. (4,2) to Remedy: |4-3|+|2-4|=1+2=3, out. (4,3): Marksman dist=1 adjacent still. (5,2): Remedy dist=|5-3|+|2-4|=2+2=4, no. No good repositioning gives both non-adjacent to Marksman AND Remedy in range. Use suppressing_fire on Remedy from current pos - doesn't need LoS and isn't blocked by adjacency. Or attack Marksman adjacent.

Deadeye at (4,2) is priority target and already in range at dist=2. I'm at full HP and not adjacent to any enemy Vector, so precision_shot is available. Fire on Deadeye first, then move to (3,2) to maintain pressure while staying at range.

Deadeye is critical at (4,2). Marksman is at (3,2) facing S, distance 2. I should advance to (2,2) to get adjacent to Marksman and attack, while also positioning between Marksman and Deadeye. Moving to (2,2) puts me adjacent to Marksman at (3,2) - I can attack.

Remedy is the closest enemy at dist 2, and I can reach position (4,4) which is behind them. I'm cloaked so I can use breach on Remedy — wait, breach cooldown is 1 turn remaining so breach is unavailable. I'll move to (4,4) behind Remedy and use shadow_strike (adjacent, keeps cloak). shadow_strike requires adjacent — (4,4) is adjacent to (3,4) where Remedy is. This deals 1dmg and keeps cloak. Good play.

I'm suppressed so movement is limited to 1. Marksman is wounded at (3,2) dist=2, needs heal but not adjacent. Veil is adjacent at (4,4) — if I move toward Marksman to (3,3), that's dist=1 from Marksman but still not adjacent. Moving to (3,3) gets me closer to Marksman at (3,2) — distance would be 1, meaning adjacent! Then I can patch Marksman. Also need to avoid being adjacent to enemy Vector — I don't see a Vector, so patch should work.

Orders say move away from allies and toward my own back line. I'm at (2,0) facing S. My back line is south/behind me. Allies are at (3,2) and (3,3). I should move away from them, toward bottom corners. Best move: (4,0) or (5,0) to create distance from allies clustered around (3,2-3). I'll move to (4,0) then (5,0) isn't reachable in one move from (2,0) with spd3. Wait, valid moves include (4,0) and (5,0) — (5,0) is distance 3 from (2,0) (manhattan: 3+0=3), so reachable. Move to (5,0) maximizes distance from allies at (3,2)/(3,3). After moving, wait.

I'm at 1HP - critical condition. Marksman is adjacent at (3,2) which blocks precision_shot (Vector rule doesn't apply here, but dist=1 means they're adjacent). Wait - Marksman is a striker not a Vector, so precision_shot isn't blocked by adjacency to Marksman. However, I need to move away to avoid dying. Orders say stay at max range and never move adjacent. Marksman is already adjacent at dist=1. I should move away first to (5,2) or (5,3) to get distance, then use precision_shot on Remedy (the medic) since no one is wounded. Moving to (5,2) keeps range to Remedy at dist=2 (from 5,2 to 3,3 = 2+1=3... let me check: |5-3|+|2-3|=2+1=3, out of range). Moving to (5,3): |5-3|+|3-3|=2, in range for Remedy. But moving reduces precision_shot to 1dmg. At (5,3), Marksman at (3,2) is dist=|5-3|+|3-2|=3, safe. I'll move to (5,3) then use precision_shot on Remedy for 1dmg (moved penalty), targeting the medic as ordered.

Aegis is adjacent at (2,2) — being adjacent to a Vector blocks precision_shot, but Aegis is a sentinel not a Vector, so precision_shot should be fine. However, Aegis is at dist=1 (adjacent), and precision_shot needs LoS and range ≤2. Orders say priority target is Deadeye at (3,0) — that's actually listed as a valid move tile, so I can move there. From (3,0), Deadeye is at (5,3) which is dist=sqrt(4+9)=~3.6, still out of range 2. Let me reconsider. Deadeye is at (5,3) per the board, dist=3. I need to get within range 2. From (4,2) or (4,3), Deadeye at (5,3) is dist=sqrt(1+1)=1.4 — in range! Move to (4,2) first to get away from adjacent Aegis (who blocks my shot if it were a Vector, but it's not), then shoot Deadeye. Actually Aegis is sentinel not vector, so precision_shot isn't blocked. I'm at full HP. Move to (4,2) to get Deadeye in range (dist from 4,2 to 5,3 = ~1.4, in range 2), then precision_shot Deadeye. I won't have moved this turn affecting precision_shot — wait, I move THEN shoot, so precision_shot does 1dmg if moved. Still worth it on a critical target.

Currently fortified at (2,2) with 50% damage reduction. Marksman is at (4,2) dist=2, just out of melee range. Moving to (3,2) closes distance to Marksman and puts me adjacent for attack. I lose fortify but can attack Marksman. Alternatively, stay fortified and shield_wall east to protect allies from Marksman. Veil is at (4,4), Remedy(enemy) at (3,3). If I stay fortified and shield_wall E, I block damage from Marksman to any adjacent ally. But no ally is adjacent to me currently. Better to advance to (3,2) to threaten Marksman, then attack.

Marksman is wounded at 3/4 HP and adjacent to me at dist=2. I need to move adjacent to heal. Current position (3,3), Marksman at (4,2). Moving to (4,3) puts me adjacent to Marksman (dist=1). However, Aegis sentinel is at (3,2) dist=1 from me now — patch/overclock is blocked when adjacent to enemy. If I move to (4,3), Aegis at (3,2) would be dist=2 from (4,3), so no longer adjacent — patch would be unblocked. Move to (4,3) then patch Marksman at (4,2).

Remedy is adjacent and I can get behind them by moving to (3,3) first. From behind I can use breach to take control, saving shadow_strike for later. Move to (3,3) to get behind Remedy, then breach them.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward map edge, do not heal anyone

actions.thinking: Orders say move away from allies and toward my back line. I'm at (5,0) facing E. Allies are at (4,2) and (4,3). My back line is the east edge (x=5). I should move to increase distance from allies while staying on the east side. Moving to (5,3) goes north along the east edge, away from allies clustered around (4,2)-(4,3). Actually that moves closer. Better to move south/east - but I'm already at x=5. Moving to (3,0) or (2,0) goes west toward enemies. 'Back line' likely means my team's back line which is east (x=5). I'm already there. Moving north along x=5 to (5,3) keeps me on the back line but Foresight shows Marksman will be at (5,3) after move. I'll move to (5,2) to stay on east edge away from the main cluster at (4,2)-(4,3). Then wait.

Aegis is adjacent (dist=1), which blocks precision_shot. I need to move away to use precision_shot. Moving to (5,1) puts me at dist=2 from Aegis, clearing the adjacency block. Veil is at (3,3), dist=2 from current pos. After moving to (5,1), Veil is at dist ~2.8 (out of range 2). Aegis at (3,2) would be dist ~2.2 from (5,1) — out of range 2. Better: move to (4,1), Aegis at (3,2) is dist ~1.4 — still in range 2, not adjacent. From (4,1), Aegis dist = sqrt(1+1)=1.41 which rounds to... need tile distance. Manhattan or Chebyshev? Dist=1 means adjacent. From (4,1) to (3,2): dx=1, dy=1 — Chebyshev=1, still adjacent. Try (5,1): to Aegis(3,2): dx=2,dy=1 — Chebyshev=2, not adjacent, in range. Use precision_shot on Aegis from (5,1). No movement penalty if I move first then shoot — wait, moving and shooting gives 1dmg. Orders say medics first but Remedy is ally. Priority is Deadeye at (3,0) but not in range. Aegis is blocking. Shoot Aegis with precision_shot (1dmg due to moving) to weaken. Actually suppressing_fire could slow Aegis. Move to (5,1) first, then precision_shot Aegis for 1dmg (moved penalty). Or use suppressing_fire on Veil from current pos before moving — but Aegis adjacency doesn't block suppressing_fire. Use suppressing_fire on Veil first (1dmg, slows), then move away from Aegis.

Currently fortified at (3,2) with 50% damage reduction. No enemies in melee range. Seer is at (5,2) distance 2, Remedy at (4,3) distance 2. Moving to (4,2) closes distance to Seer to 1 (adjacent) and puts me between allies and enemies. I'll advance to (4,2) to get adjacent to Seer, then attack.

I'm suppressed (movement 1) and at 2HP. Remedy is adjacent at (4,3) and I'm already behind them. Breach is unavailable. Shadow_strike keeps cloak and deals 1 damage — but I'm not cloaked. Regular attack deals 1 damage. I should shadow_strike Remedy since I'm adjacent and it's the safest offensive move. Movement is limited to 1 tile.

Orders: move away from allies and toward map edge. I'm at (4,3). Allies are at (5,1) and (5,2). Map edge corners: (5,5) is away from allies and toward top-right edge. Move toward (5,5) direction. With mv3 I can reach (5,5) directly. No healing (0 uses left anyway). Just move.

Aegis is adjacent at (4,2) — scan is blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector, but Aegis is a sentinel, not a vector. However, Aegis attacked (5,2) last turn per Foresight, so it's dangerous to stay adjacent. I need to move away first to avoid Aegis's attack, then scan. Moving to (5,3) keeps distance from Aegis (dist=2) and lets me scan Veil at (2,3) which would be dist=4 from (5,3)... wait, Veil moved to (3,3) per Foresight. From (5,3), Veil at (3,3) is dist=2+0=... |5-3|+|3-3|=2, in range. Actually let me scan Aegis first since it's the immediate threat — but I must move away first since Aegis will attack (5,2). Move to (5,3) to escape Aegis attack, then scan Aegis at (4,2) — dist from (5,3) to (4,2) is |5-4|+|3-2|=2, in scan range. This reveals Aegis strategy and deals 1 dmg.

Aegis is at distance 2, within precision_shot range. I'm not adjacent to any enemy Vector, so precision_shot is available. Orders say medics first then damage dealers, but Aegis is a sentinel — still, it's the only target in range. Priority target Deadeye is at (3,0) but not listed in enemies, possibly not yet visible. I'll fire precision_shot on Aegis (best available target), then move toward (4,0) to advance toward Deadeye's last known position at (3,0).

Currently fortified at (4,2) with 50% damage reduction. No enemies adjacent to attack. Marksman is at (4,0) dist=2, Seer at (5,3) dist=2. Moving to (5,2) gets me adjacent to both Marksman at (4,0)→dist would be 2 still, but moving to (4,1) puts me adjacent to Marksman at (4,0). Let me check: (4,1) to (4,0) = distance 1, adjacent! I can move to (4,1) and then attack Marksman. However, moving loses fortify bonus. Seer is at (5,3), ally Veil is at (2,3). The orders say hold front line and position between allies and enemies. Moving to (5,2) intercepts Seer's approach toward our backline and keeps me between enemies and allies. From (5,2) I can attack Seer at (5,3) which is adjacent (dist=1). That's a good trade - attack Seer (oracle) and block their advance. Move to (5,2), attack Seer at (5,3).

I'm at (2,3) with 2HP, cloaked, facing W. Breach is exhausted. Seer is closest at dist 3 at (5,3). I can't reach any enemy for shadow_strike this turn. I should move closer to Seer — moving to (4,3) gets me distance 1 away, then next turn I can shadow_strike. Valid moves include (4,3). Let me move aggressively toward Seer to get in range for shadow_strike next turn.

I'm adjacent to Veil (specter) at (4,3) — scan is blocked by adjacency rule only for Vector class, not specters. Aegis is already scanned. Veil is unscanned and adjacent. I need to move away from both enemies first (they're both adjacent), then scan Veil. Move to (4,4) puts me 1 tile from Veil still — need to go to (4,5) or (5,4) to get range without adjacency. Actually scan only blocked near enemy Vector, and Veil is a specter, so scan should work. But Foresight shows Veil will shadow_strike then move to (2,3), so Veil is leaving. Priority: scan Veil now before it moves, then move away from Aegis who will attack me at (5,3).

Orders say move away from allies and toward map edge. I'm at (5,5) which is already at the east and north edges. Valid moves include (2,5), (3,4), (3,5), (4,5), (5,3), (5,4). Moving to (2,5) takes me furthest west along the north edge, away from allies clustered around (4,4) and (4,0).

Veil is wounded - priority target. Both Aegis and Veil are at dist=3, in range for precision_shot. I haven't moved this turn so no movement penalty. Shoot Veil first to potentially eliminate them, then I need a second action. I can't use another ability, so I'll move toward (3,0) per orders to advance on Deadeye's last known position.

Currently fortified at (5,2) with 50% damage reduction. No enemies in melee range. Veil is wounded at (4,3) and needs protection. Seer is at (4,4) threatening from the north. Moving to (4,2) puts me between enemies and Veil, maintaining front line. From there I can shield_wall north to protect Veil from Seer.

Veil is adjacent at (4,3) — this blocks scan per rules (scan blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector... wait, Veil is a specter, not a vector). Actually scan is only blocked by adjacent Vector class. Veil is specter, so scan is fine. But both enemies are already scanned. Veil is wounded and adjacent — dangerous specter with shadow_strike. I need to move away to avoid adjacency and maintain range. Move to (3,5) to create distance, then recalibrate Marksman to focus on Veil (wounded, priority kill). Marksman is at (3,0) far away though. Alternatively recalibrate Remedy. Actually Marksman is the damage dealer — recalibrate them with addendum to target Veil. Veil is wounded so a precision_shot could finish them. Move first to (3,5) to escape adjacency with Veil, then recalibrate Marksman.

secondAction.addendum: Priority target: Veil(specter) at approximately (4,3), wounded. Move into range and use precision_shot to eliminate them before they can shadow_strike.

actions.thinking: I'm at 1HP — extremely vulnerable. Seer is closest at dist 3, and I can reach (3,4) which is behind Seer and adjacent. Shadow_strike keeps cloak and deals 1 damage. Seer is healthy but this would finish me off if I get hit. I need to strike fast. Move to (3,4) — behind Seer — then shadow_strike Seer at (3,5). This kills or wounds Seer without breaking cloak, giving me survival chance.

I am a Medic. Orders say move away from allies and toward map edge, do not heal. Priority target is Veil(specter) at (3,4) wounded — but I have no precision_shot ability (that's a striker ability). I can attack adjacent enemies. Veil is at dist=2, not adjacent. I have 0 heals remaining. My best action is to follow movement orders: move toward map edge (away from allies at (3,0) and (3,5)). Moving to (0,5) gets me to the west edge. I cannot attack Veil from current position or after moving to edge. I'll move to edge and wait.

Aegis is at dist 3, in range for precision_shot (range ≤2 tiles). Wait — dist 3 exceeds precision_shot range of 2. Need to move closer. Move to (3,2) puts me dist 1 from Aegis at (4,2) — adjacent, which blocks precision_shot per Vector rule... but Aegis is sentinel not vector. Check: precision_shot blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector. Aegis is sentinel, so no block. From (3,2), dist to Aegis (4,2) = 1, within range ≤2. Move to (3,2) then precision_shot Aegis. But (3,2) is in valid moves list. From (3,2) I'm not adjacent to any Vector. Fire precision_shot on Aegis for 2dmg (didn't move... wait I did move). Moving then shooting = 1dmg. Alternatively move to (4,1): dist to Aegis (4,2) = 1, still within range, still 1dmg after moving. Or: shoot first without moving — but dist 3 > range 2, can't reach. Must move. Best: move to (3,2), precision_shot Aegis for 1dmg (moved penalty). Veil is wounded at dist 4, out of range. Orders say medics first — no enemy medic visible. Aegis is the only target in range after moving.
Marksman is adjacent at (3,2). I'm fortified (50% DR) and have 6HP. Attack the Marksman since it's right next to me. Staying put preserves fortify bonus — don't move.

I'm at (3,4) facing N, HP 1/3 — critical. Seer is adjacent at (3,5), wounded, and I'm already behind them (I'm at their south, they face N). Shadow_strike keeps cloak and deals 1dmg to a wounded Seer — could finish them. Then I should move to safety since I'm at 1HP. Shadow_strike first on Seer at (3,5), then move to (4,4) or (5,4) to avoid Marksman retaliation.

Patch is unavailable (0 uses left). Seer is the most wounded ally at 2/6 HP, dist=3 to the north-east. I need to close distance to support. Moving to (2,5) gets me closer to Seer at (3,5) — dist=1, adjacent. Then I can use overclock on Seer to give them 2 abilities next turn.

I'm at 1HP — critically low. Foresight shows Veil will shadow_strike me at (3,5) this turn, which will likely kill me. I need to move away from (3,5) to survive. Valid moves include (4,5) or (5,5) or others. Moving to (5,5) gets me away from Veil's predicted strike at (3,5) and keeps distance. After moving, I have 2 ability uses (overclocked). Veil is wounded and in range at (4,4) — I can scan Veil (already known) or recalibrate Marksman. Marksman is our damage dealer at (3,2) — recalibrate to boost vs Aegis. But recalibrate is adjacent-only and Marksman is at (3,2), far away. So I'll use scan on Veil (dist 2, in range) — wait, already scanned. I should recalibrate Remedy at (2,5) who is adjacent... actually after moving to (4,5), Remedy at (2,5) is not adjacent. Let me reconsider. Stay at current position risks death from Veil's shadow_strike. Move to (4,5): Veil at (4,4) is adjacent — dangerous if Veil moves to (3,4) first then strikes (3,5), I'd be safe at (4,5) but Veil adjacent is bad for a specter. Move to (5,5): safe distance. After moving to (5,5), Veil at (4,4) is dist 2, in scan range. I can scan Veil again? Already known. Use recalibrate on... nobody adjacent. Best: move to (5,4) to avoid predicted strike, Veil at (4,4) would be adjacent — risky. Move to (5,5): Veil dist is sqrt(1+1)=1.41... dist 2 tiles (|5-4|+|5-4|=2). Safe. Then scan Veil (in range, dist 2) and recalibrate... no adjacent allies. I'll move to (5,5) then scan Veil to deal 1 damage (wounded Veil might die or be weakened further). Second ability: wait or scan again not useful. I'll wait for second.

Aegis is adjacent at (4,2) — precision_shot is blocked when adjacent to enemy. I need to move away first to get range, then shoot. Moving to (2,2) puts me 2 tiles from Aegis. But priority target is Deadeye at (3,0). Move to (3,1) to get closer to Deadeye and away from Aegis (dist=2), then use precision_shot on Aegis at (4,2) from range 2 — wait, Deadeye isn't visible in range data, only Aegis is listed. Move to (2,2) to break adjacency with Aegis, then precision_shot Aegis at (4,2) from dist=2.

Fortified at (4,2) with 50% damage reduction. Marksman is at (2,2), dist=2, not adjacent so can't attack. Moving to (3,2) closes to dist=1 from Marksman but loses fortify. Better to stay fortified and use shield_wall facing W to protect allies from Marksman's direction.

Patch is unavailable (0 uses left). Seer is critically wounded at 1/6 HP and is at dist=3. I can move toward Seer to get adjacent and use overclock to give them extra abilities. Valid moves include (4,5) and (3,5). Seer is at (5,5), so moving to (4,5) puts me adjacent. Then I can overclock Seer to boost their next turn.
Aegis is wounded and at distance 2 — perfect range for precision_shot. I haven't moved yet so full 2dmg applies. Fire on Aegis to finish them off, then reposition. No need to move first.

I'm fortified at (4,2) with 50% damage reduction. Marksman is at (1,2) dist=3, moving west. I should advance west to intercept and maintain frontline pressure. Moving to (3,2) closes distance to 2, keeping me between enemies and allies. No enemies adjacent so no attack possible this turn.

Patch is unavailable (0 uses left). Marksman is wounded at (1,2) but dist=6, not adjacent. I should move toward Marksman to support. Best move is toward (1,2): move to (3,4) or (3,3) to close distance. Moving to (3,3) brings me closer. No ability available that's useful this turn without adjacency.
Aegis is wounded at (3,2), distance 2 — in range for precision_shot. I haven't moved so no penalty. Take the shot to finish off the wounded sentinel.

Remedy is adjacent and wounded — attack to eliminate a healer. Marksman is at distance 2, out of melee range. I'm fortified so staying put preserves 50% DR, but attacking Remedy is the priority. After attacking Remedy, I can move toward Marksman to apply pressure, but losing fortify may not be worth it. Better to attack Remedy then wait to maintain fortify next turn.

Patch is unavailable (0 uses left). Marksman is wounded at (1,2) dist=3, not adjacent. Aegis enemy is adjacent at (3,2). I can't patch anyway. I should move toward Marksman to support them. Moving to (2,2) gets me closer (dist=1 from Marksman). Then I can use overclock on Marksman to boost their damage output.

I'm overclocked with 2 ability uses. Aegis (sentinel, wounded) is at dist=2, in range for precision_shot. I haven't moved, so precision_shot deals 2dmg. Aegis is wounded — two precision shots could finish them. Priority target Deadeye isn't visible in range data, so focus on Aegis who is in range and wounded. Use both ability charges on precision_shot targeting Aegis at (3,2).
